headline: Woman Accidentally Likes Ex's New Girlfriend's Photo From 2019, Immediately Deletes Instagram
summary: She has since reactivated, deactivated, and reactivated again. Her friends are exhausted.
fullBody: Jessica PanicButton was deep-stalking her ex's new girlfriend when her thumb slipped. 'I was three years deep into her photos,' Jessica whispered. '2019 Coachella. I liked it.' She immediately deleted the app, then reinstalled to unlike it, then deleted it again. 'Maybe she won't notice,' Jessica said, sweating. The girlfriend has since posted a story with the caption 'lol some people are so weird.' Jessica is now 'taking a social media break for mental health.'
